steps.title: Identify what data comparison supports the claim
steps.content: The claim is that the number has fallen overall since 2010. To justify this, we need evidence comparing the 2010 starting point with a later year showing a decrease.

steps.title: Find the choice with the correct data and comparison
steps.content:
Choice A directly compares 2010 (approximately 1,000 articles) to 2019 (approximately 500 articles), demonstrating the claimed decline. Choices B and C misread the data, while D shows an increase from 2010 to 2013 rather than decline.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
